grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  www.nature.com/scientificreports OPEN Single-base station positioning for photovoltaic power plant inspection UAVs based on PPP-B2b signal Lin Zhou, WeiCheng Xie, Lin Hu & ShuWen Zheng Aiming at the situation where photovoltaic power stations in remote areas suffer from poor communication networks, which makes reliable acquisition of satellite precise orbit data and clock offset
Keywords PPP-B2b, Multipath error, Photovoltaic power plant, UAV, Precise point positioning In the field of power inspection, inspection drones are increasingly widely applied.
